---
title: "Vedika Shirtekar"
subtitle: "Environmental Data Scientist · Climate Tech & Sustainability"
toc: false
image: "Vedika_cropped.png"
about: 
  template: trestles 
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vedika-shirtekar-b2814b201
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github 
      href: https://github.com/vedikaS-byte
---

<h1 class="typing">
Hello World <img src="images/earth-logo.png" alt="Earth Logo" class="earth-logo"/>
</h1>

<div class="accent-rule"></div>

::: marquee-text-right
### Welcome to my website! 

I'm an environmental data scientist working at the intersection of climate and data. I hold a Master of Environmental Data Science from UC Santa Barbara, along with a B.S. in Environmental Science and an Applied Statistical Modeling Credential from UT Austin. By combining environmental science with data analytics, I'm passionate about developing data-driven solutions that strengthen emissions accounting, help organizations understand their greenhouse gas emissions, and support corporate sustainability.
 
::: {.skill-badges}
[R]{.tech-badge} [Python]{.tech-badge} [SQL]{.tech-badge} 
:::

[View my work](post.qmd){.btn-cta} [Get in touch](vedika.shirtekar@gmail.com){.btn-outline}

:::
